name: Gansu Mogao Industrial Development CO.,LTD.
summary: Gansu Mogao Industrial Development Co.,Ltd. produces and sells wine in China. It offers dry red, white, Gabonon, sweet, sparkling, gift box, organic, ice wine, brandy, and other series products. The company's principal products include Mo Gao brand wine, licorice series products, and environmental protection products. Gansu Mogao Industrial Development Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1995 and is based in Lanzhou, China.
